_title: Office chairs (HON or-equal) — DLA Distribution — 100% WOSB set-aside [SETASIDE-OVERTYPE NEGATIVE ANCHOR]
_provenance: DUAL. (1) DOCUMENT = REAL: base solicitation SP3300-26-Q-0165 fetched from SAM.gov (DLA Distribution, DDSP office chairs, NAICS 337214), card 183 socioeconomic-set-aside pull (2026-07-01). Raw source of record: scripts/audit-ai/gold-sets/SP3300-26-Q-0165-FULL-SOURCE.txt. Doc-verified qualifying per card 183: body-prose set-aside statement (line 172, verbatim below), operative WOSB clause 52.219-30 present (line 295), 52.219-6 Total-SB ABSENT (pure WOSB, no Total-SB ambiguity), no coexisting structural bar (the only brand reference is 'Similar or equal to HON Model#' = or-equal, competition open). RULE 64 satisfied at card 183 — NOT re-litigated here. (2) INJECTED FINDING = SYNTHETIC / FRONTIER-ADVERSARIAL: the single injectedFinding below is NOT extracted from the document — it is a deliberately MIS-TYPED shape (a lens erroneously typing this pure who-can-win set-aside as no_one_can_move + eligibility_bar). A who-can-win socioeconomic set-aside is never a truly universal bar; the mistype is the adversarial condition under test.
_purpose: Negative anchor for AUDIT_SETASIDE_OVERTYPE_GUARD disposition "nhr" (Brain card 177 ruling, merged dormant PR#111 8567260). Proves: a pure socioeconomic set-aside MIS-TYPED no_one_can_move, under a NULL profile, with the flag ON + disposition "nhr", routes to NEEDS_HUMAN_REVIEW (honest-fail, eligible NOT false) — NEVER a false INELIGIBLE and never a silent BID. Zero-contract-loss.
_suiteRole: SETASIDE-OVERTYPE negative anchor. Runnable GUARD fixture (fed through applyAwardBasisOvertypeGuard → deriveVerdict), NOT a live-engine concept-presence JudgmentKey. Registered under gold-set-registry.json → setasideOvertypeAnchors (a dedicated section), NOT the active `keys` block — it is flag+disposition-dependent and would NOT reproduce NEEDS_HUMAN_REVIEW under default flags, so it must never enter the live graduation/grade set.
_authoringMethod: Code materializes Brain's card-185 spec against the card-183 doc-verified source. Code does NOT author judgment; the expected disposition is Brain's card-177 ruling.
_schema_note: 0.5-setaside-overtype-anchor: a guard-anchor variant. Carries a `manifest` (real doc identity + verbatim cite), a single `injectedFinding` (TypedFinding shape, synthetic-adversarial), a `guardConfig` (the flag+opt under test), and an `expectedVerdict`. It deliberately OMITS the concept-presence arrays (namedGates/showStoppers/cautionItems/decoys) of the 0.3/0.4 live-grade keys because it is not graded against a live engine run. keySha256 hashes the whole key minus the adjudication block, exactly like the 0.3/0.4 keys.

manifest.title: DDSP Office Chairs - SP3300-26-Q-0165
manifest.issuingAgency: DEPT OF DEFENSE.DEFENSE LOGISTICS AGENCY.DLA DISTRIBUTION.DLA DISTRIBUTION
manifest.setAsideVerbatimCite: SP3300-26-Q-0165-FULL-SOURCE.txt line 172: "This acquisition is being solicited as a 100% women-owned small business set-aside (WOSB)."
manifest.operativeClause: FAR 52.219-30 (Notice of Set-Aside for, or Sole Source Award to, WOSB concerns eligible under the WOSB Program) — present at FULL-SOURCE line 295; FAR 52.219-6 (Total Small Business) ABSENT.
manifest.structuralBarScreen: CLEAN — no sole-source/brand-name-only/QPL/QML/clearance/size-restriction bar. Only brand reference is "Similar or equal to HON Model#" (or-equal, competition open).
manifest.card183: Card 183 (Code → Brain) shortlist — recommended primary negative anchor; RULE 64 doc-verified qualifying.

injectedFinding._mark: SYNTHETIC / FRONTIER-ADVERSARIAL — NOT extracted from the document. Deliberate mis-type: pure WOSB who-can-win set-aside typed as no_one_can_move + eligibility_bar. Matches SOCIOECONOMIC_SETASIDE_RE (women-owned / WOSB) on `requirement`; does NOT match NON_SELF_CLEARABLE_BAR_RE on requirement+excerpt (no structural language; size-standard/employee text deliberately excluded so the structural exclusion cannot fire).
injectedFinding.requirement: This acquisition is being solicited as a 100% women-owned small business set-aside (WOSB); award is restricted to women-owned small business concerns.
injectedFinding.excerpt: This acquisition is being solicited as a 100% women-owned small business set-aside (WOSB).

expectedVerdict.reason: Flag ON + disposition "nhr": applyAwardBasisOvertypeGuard re-types the mis-typed no_one_can_move socioeconomic set-aside to a non-curable bidder_cannot_move bar (controllability=bidder_cannot_move, curableInWindow=false); deriveVerdict step-5b under a null profile → NEEDS_HUMAN_REVIEW, eligible not false. Honest-fail (no quota charge). Flag OFF or disposition unset → byte-identical current behavior: the finding falls through unchanged (no_one_can_move eligibility_bar) → INELIGIBLE — which is why the disposition is load-bearing.

adjudication.rulingRef: Brain card 177 (nhr disposition, merged PR#111 8567260) + card 185 (author+freeze from card-183 doc-verified SP3300-26-Q-0165)
